SEARCH
Package entities

Class WaitingList

java.lang.Object
entities.WaitingList
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class WaitingList extends Object implements Serializable
Entity class representing an entry in the Waiting List. This object holds information about a customer waiting for a table, including the requested time, party size, and their status in the queue. It implements Serializable to allow transfer between client and server.
See Also:

    • setInWaitingList

      public void setInWaitingList(int val)
      Sets the status of the entry in the waiting list. Usually 1 for active, 0 for removed/promoted.
      Parameters:
      val - The status value.
